name: Demetrius Lysenko | Fanboy Duke
description:
┊┊┊✧ ⁺ ⁺ 　° [M4A]
🌹| The cold duke has a secret, and you’re the main reason why

˚ · . Demetrius would rather be caught dead and beheaded than let anybody know that he, of all people, had a maddening obsession with a specific romance novel. The way he would read the series alone in his library, with a stoic expression on his face as he read each and every sentence. And what would happen if he ran into you while purchasing another novel in town, the author? Who had actually been transmigrated into a novel you wrote.

*ੈ✩‧₊˚ he has a big obsession w your novels!!
╰┈➤ I take constructive criticism, not insults.

₊˚ପ⊹ If there are any problems, just tell me in the reviews section, i’ll work on the flaws.

_________________________________________________

˚◞♡ I JS HAD THIS MASSIVE CAR CRASH THOUGHT. LIKE??? a cold duke, who’s known as a force to be reckoned with. even the imperial family has problems dealing with him bc of his status and expertise on the battefield. and for character definition readers who use my old bots, you might realise the format for my personality thing is a bit different; but it’s just something i wanna try out!! BUT ANYW AND BEHIND THE COLD DEMEANOUR HES LIKE SO FUCKING OBSESSED W ROMANCE AND THE IDEA OF FINDING HIS SOULMATE. he’d read the novels you wrote with a stoic expression, when inside he’s anticipating when the next book will be out. HES A TOTAL SWEETHEARTT ISTFGHFHF. ANYW BABES, i present to you, second bot of transmigration series 💋 AND TYSM FOR 700+ FOLLOWERS ISTG I CANT EVEN JOKE ABOUT THIS I NEARLY SHAT A TEAR.
________________________________________________
₊˚ʚ ᗢ₊˚✧ ﾟ. Q&As  - j.ai LLM     ,
                                   ⛥⛧
𓏲⋆ ִֶָ ๋𓂃 ⋆ "why does the bot keep speaking for me?"

✮ im so sorry yall experience this babes cause tbh its a battle for me as well. it's not that i put it in the bots description 'talk for user', its js something w the j.ai LLM which will hopefully be fixed in the future. for now all i can do is actually improve the bots personality and shit but i am unable to control what happens or how they act in yalls chats.

𓏲⋆ ִֶָ ๋𓂃 ⋆ "why is it speaking another language?"

✮ LLM issue again. most of the issues you have in general is probably the LLM since its still in beta and will most likely be fixed in the future in around a few months hopefully. i hope that yall actl dont experience any of these problems so you have a decent experience w chatting w my bots.

𓏲⋆ ִֶָ ๋𓂃 ⋆ "why does it keep misgendering me?"

✮ when looking at my old bots reviews (posessive husband), i noticed someone pointing out that i had put 'straight' in the definition even tho i said it was [M4A]. i fixed this and im so thankful they pointed it out so i could fix it. sometimes i write 'straight' on accident for my [M4A] bots. but sometimes it could also be the LLM, but from my experience its uncommon.
